ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the GitHub repository */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the GitHub repository */,
  "actor" TEXT /* Actor who created or modified the issue */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the issue creation or modification */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the issue description */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the issue (e.g., start, close) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Processed clean text of the issue description */,
  "issue_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels for better categorization */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned actor */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the milestone */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the issue for better context and collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES issue_actions ("action_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_issue_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("issue_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_owner FOREIGN KEY ("project_owner") REFERENCES projects ("project_owner"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_actor FOREIGN KEY ("actor") REFERENCES actors ("actor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_name FOREIGN KEY ("project_name") REFERENCES projects ("project_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "issue_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "issue_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type (e.g., feature, bug, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., start, close) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated issue */,
  "project_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the GitHub repository */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the GitHub repository */,
  "actor" TEXT /* Actor who created or modified the pull request */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the pull request creation or modification */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the pull request description */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the pull request (e.g., create, merge) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Processed clean text of the pull request description */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the pull request */,
  "issue_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the pull request */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels for better categorization */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned actor */,
  "base_branch" TEXT /* Base branch to which the pull request is being merged */,
  "head_branch" TEXT /* Head branch from which the pull request is being created */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the pull request for better context and collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_actor FOREIGN KEY ("actor") REFERENCES actors ("actor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_name FOREIGN KEY ("project_name") REFERENCES projects ("project_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_owner FOREIGN KEY ("project_owner") REFERENCES projects ("project_owner"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_issue_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("issue_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES pull_request_actions ("action_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., create, merge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the GitHub repository */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the GitHub repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the project (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the actor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the actor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the actor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action performed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES issue_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action performed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_history_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_history_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES pull_request_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_history_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_pull_request_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_pull_request_links_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_pull_request_links_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_history" (
  "commit_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit history event */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pull request */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash */,
  "commit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_pull_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_request_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
